evals.name: proposal-defense-deck
evals.prompt: Make a Beamer deck for my grant proposal: objectives, methodology, timeline, milestones, budget, and risks.
evals.expected_behavior: Triggers deck-beamer-proposal-report. Uses the proposal spine (significance, gap, objectives as testable aims, approach, preliminary results, Gantt timeline, dated milestones, risks→mitigations, budget). Spec first, then .tex with pgfgantt and booktabs tables; full budget/work-package detail in a backup appendix.

evals.name: progress-report-deck
evals.prompt: I need a mid-term progress report deck in LaTeX showing what we promised vs. what we delivered, including which milestones slipped.
evals.expected_behavior: Triggers deck-beamer-proposal-report in report mode: recap of objectives, progress-vs-plan status table with done/on-track/at-risk macros, honest milestone status, deviations and why, updated risks, revised timeline. Does not hide slippage.

evals.name: disambig-vs-academic-talk
evals.prompt: Turn my accepted paper into Beamer slides for the conference presentation.
evals.expected_behavior: Defers to deck-beamer-academic (single-paper contribution talk), not the proposal/report spine.
